title: ZILFIT LiveFit Scan Stream Profile Schema v2
description: Engineering simulation schema for live camera stream foot scan. No medical, diagnostic, or therapeutic claims.

manual_photo_capture.description: Must always be false. LiveFit uses live stream only.

hardware_required.description: Must always be false. No external hardware required.

stream_ready.description: True if live camera stream is active and usable.

foot_detected.description: True if foot was detected across stable frames. False triggers rejection.

floor_plane_anchor.description: True if AR floor plane anchor was established for scale reference.

stable_frame_count.description: Number of stable frames collected from live stream.

lighting_quality.description: Estimated lighting condition across sampled frames.

occlusion_detected.description: True if occlusion was detected over the foot region.

optional_depth_sensor.description: True if a depth sensor was available and used.

camera_angle_quality.description: Quality of camera angle relative to foot. Optimal is near top-down.

motion_blur_score.description: Motion blur estimate across frames. 0.0 = no blur, 1.0 = severe blur. Lower is better.

scale_anchor_confidence.description: Confidence in the scale anchor used for measurement. Higher is better.

frame_consistency_score.description: Inter-frame consistency of foot detection across stable frames. Higher is better.

estimated_foot_length_mm.description: Estimated foot length in millimetres. Engineering estimate only.

estimated_foot_width_mm.description: Estimated foot width in millimetres. Engineering estimate only.

estimated_arch_index.description: Estimated arch index. 0.0 = flat, 1.0 = high arch. Engineering estimate only.

scan_confidence.description: Composite scan confidence. >=0.85 pass, 0.75-0.84 review_required, <0.75 rejected.

decision_status.description: Final scan decision based on confidence, stream quality, and foot detection.
